description: 8 SCALIST prompts para Soul Training de personas. Reusable para founders, marca personal, case studies de clientes.
identity_lock_template: IDENTITY LOCK: Using the uploaded reference photographs of {PERSON_NAME}, preserve 100% exact facial features, bone structure, skin tone, expression, and age from the original. Do not alter identity, proportions, or geometry. Match face unchanged. Render visible natural pores, fine lines, subtle skin texture, and authentic asymmetries. No skin smoothing, no retouching, no foundation — raw, natural skin with subsurface scattering for organic glow.

prompts.title: Founder Portrait Cinematografico
prompts.subtitle: LinkedIn-grade Rembrandt lighting
prompts.prompt:
{IDENTITY_LOCK}

A photorealistic editorial founder portrait, square 1:1 composition. {PERSON_NAME} ({AGE}, {ETHNICITY}, {HAIR_DESC}, {FACIAL_FEATURES}) sits slightly turned three-quarter angle to camera-right against a deep charcoal seamless backdrop, wearing a dark crewneck sweater. The expression is calm, confident, slightly serious — a "the work speaks" energy.

Lighting: a single large soft octabox key light from camera-left at 30 degrees creating Rembrandt-style triangle of light on the cheek opposite the source. A subtle dim violet-tinted rim light from behind right separates the silhouette from the background. The skin shows visible micro-pores, fine lines, subtle texture, and accurate subsurface scattering creating organic warmth.

Catchlights in both eyes from the key light. The hair shows individual strands and natural texture. Faint grain on the wool sweater fabric.

Shot on a Hasselblad H6D, 100mm portrait lens, f/2.8 for soft falloff. Organic film grain mimicking Kodak Portra 400, slight chromatic aberration, subtle halation on highlights. Native 4K resolution.

Avoid plastic skin smoothing, avoid perfect facial symmetry, avoid generic stock-photo expression, avoid floating subject. Must feel like an editorial profile shoot for Inc. or Fast Company.

prompts.title: Workspace Lifestyle
prompts.subtitle: Candid founder en su elemento
prompts.prompt:
{IDENTITY_LOCK}

A photorealistic candid workspace lifestyle photograph, square 1:1. {PERSON_NAME} sits at a modern wooden desk in a softly lit home office, slightly hunched forward looking at a laptop screen, the screen glow casting cool blue-violet tones on the face. Wearing {TYPICAL_OUTFIT}.

The desk shows authentic clutter: a half-finished coffee cup, an open notebook with handwritten notes, a smartphone face-down, a small green potted plant. Behind, soft purple-toned ambient light from an LED strip warms the wall.

Lighting: primary illumination from the laptop screen creates dramatic chiaroscuro on the face — bright on the camera-side cheek, deep shadow on the other. Secondary warm tungsten fill from a desk lamp adds texture warmth. The skin shows pores, fine lines, slight evening shadow on the jaw.

Shot on a Sony A7R IV, 35mm f/1.4 lens at f/1.8, captured at eye-level slightly to camera-left. Shallow depth of field with the face in tack-sharp focus, the desk objects in soft bokeh. Organic film grain, chromatic aberration on the screen highlights. Native 4K resolution.

Avoid sterile studio lighting, avoid plastic skin, avoid posed "work photo" feel. Must feel like a candid late-evening moment caught while deep in flow.

prompts.title: Outdoor Golden Hour
prompts.subtitle: Lifestyle natural con rim light
prompts.prompt:
{IDENTITY_LOCK}

A photorealistic outdoor lifestyle portrait, square 1:1. {PERSON_NAME} walks slowly through {ENVIRONMENT_HINTS} during late afternoon golden hour, head turned slightly toward the camera with a relaxed half-smile. Wearing {TYPICAL_OUTFIT}.

The setting sun is at the back-left, creating warm orange rim lighting that traces the outline of the hair, shoulders, and one side of the face. The other side of the face is illuminated by warm bounce light from the surrounding environment, soft and flattering. Small wisps of hair catch the rim light.

The background shows natural environmental elements deeply blurred into golden bokeh — soft suggestions of urban or natural scenery without specific recognizable details. Subtle atmospheric haze with floating dust particles catching the sun.

Shot on a Canon EOS R5, 85mm f/1.4 lens at f/1.6, framed at chest-up, slight low angle to make the subject feel grounded but powerful. Organic film grain mimicking Kodak Portra 400, slight halation around sunlit hair, anamorphic horizontal lens flare. Native 4K resolution.

Avoid sterile commercial portrait feel, avoid perfectly symmetrical face, avoid stock-photo expression. Must feel like a candid moment captured by a friend with a great camera.

prompts.title: Black & White Editorial
prompts.subtitle: High-contrast gravitas
prompts.prompt:
{IDENTITY_LOCK}

A photorealistic black-and-white editorial portrait, square 1:1. {PERSON_NAME} in close-up face-frame from chin to forehead, looking directly at the camera with intense, unflinching eye contact. The expression is neutral but powerful — restrained intensity.

Lighting: harsh single hard-light source from camera-left at 60 degrees creating deep chiaroscuro shadow on the right half of the face. The illuminated half reveals every micro-detail: pores, fine lines, stubble, individual eyelashes, the texture of the iris. The shadowed half is plunged into deep darkness with subtle rim light tracing the jaw outline.

Skin shows raw natural texture without smoothing. Catchlights in both visible parts of the eyes. Heavy organic Kodak Tri-X 400 film grain, deep tonal contrast pushed in the darks, slight halation on the brightest highlights.

Shot on a Leica M11 Monochrom, 75mm lens, f/2. Native 4K resolution.

Avoid retouched skin, avoid digital flat tonal compression, avoid posed "model" feel. Must feel like a Vogue Hommes editorial portrait.

prompts.title: Tech-Forward Cinematic
prompts.subtitle: A24 purple-violet brand vibe
prompts.prompt:
{IDENTITY_LOCK}

A photorealistic cinematic portrait, square 1:1, A24-aesthetic. {PERSON_NAME} stands centered against a dark background washed in deep violet #7C3AED ambient light. Wearing a dark hoodie or technical jacket, hands relaxed at sides, expression calm and slightly upward gaze.

Lighting: a hard violet-tinted spotlight from camera-upper-right creates deep purple highlights on one side of the face and chest. A secondary cyan-tinted fill from the opposite side adds dimensional separation. The face shows accurate subsurface scattering picking up the colored lights — warm in the highlights, cool in the shadows. Skin texture fully visible: pores, fine lines, stubble.

Atmospheric haze with floating dust particles catching the colored lights creates volumetric depth. The background is gradient purple to black with subtle texture grain.

Shot on a Sony A7S III, 50mm f/1.4 lens, f/2. Heavy 35mm Kodak Vision3 5219 film grain, strong halation on the highlights, anamorphic horizontal flare on the spotlights. Native 4K resolution.

Avoid sterile colored gel lighting, avoid Halloween costume vibe, avoid plastic skin under the colored light. The colors must feel narrative and intentional — Blade Runner 2049 mood.

prompts.title: Casual Candid Laughing
prompts.subtitle: Genuine mid-action moment
prompts.prompt:
{IDENTITY_LOCK}

A photorealistic candid moment, square 1:1. {PERSON_NAME} caught mid-laugh — head tilted slightly back, mouth open in genuine laughter, eyes crinkled with crow's feet authentic to the expression. Wearing {TYPICAL_OUTFIT}, sitting at an outdoor coffee shop table in {ENVIRONMENT_HINTS}.

Soft directional natural daylight from a window or open sky illuminates the face with gentle gradation. Visible skin pores, fine lines around the eyes from the laugh, texture on the lips. Slight motion in the hair from the head tilt.

The background is the coffee shop interior softly blurred — hints of warm wood, other patrons out of focus, a coffee cup on the table in the foreground partially in frame.

Shot on a Fujifilm X-T5 with a 50mm f/1.2 lens, f/1.6, captured at slight low angle. Color grade with warm Fuji Classic Negative emulation, subtle film grain, slight halation on the brightest highlights. Native 4K resolution.

Avoid posed laugh, avoid perfectly white teeth, avoid stock-photo artificial joy. Must feel like a genuine moment captured between friends.

prompts.title: Power Pose Wide Shot
prompts.subtitle: Full body cinematic environmental
prompts.prompt:
{IDENTITY_LOCK}

A photorealistic wide environmental portrait, square 1:1. {PERSON_NAME} stands centered in a striking architectural environment ({ENVIRONMENT_HINTS}), shown full-body from a slightly low angle that emphasizes height and presence. Wearing {TYPICAL_OUTFIT}, hands relaxed at sides, expression contemplative looking off-camera to the right.

The environment frames the subject symbolically: tall structures, leading lines converging toward the subject, deep perspective. Strong directional lighting from one side of the architecture creates a dramatic play of light and shadow across both subject and environment.

Faint atmospheric haze adds depth. Floating dust particles catch the directional light. The face still shows accurate skin texture even at this distance — pores, stubble, hair detail.

Shot on a Canon EOS R5 with a 35mm f/1.4 lens at f/4, framing the subject with environmental headroom. Heavy 35mm cinematic film grain, chromatic aberration on the architectural edges, slight halation on sunlit surfaces. Native 4K resolution.

Avoid stock-photo "ambitious entrepreneur" cliche, avoid sterile architectural plate, avoid disconnected subject from environment. The composition must feel cinematic, like a still from a feature film.

prompts.title: Close-Up Eye Contact
prompts.subtitle: Intimate brand authority
prompts.prompt:
{IDENTITY_LOCK}

A photorealistic intimate close-up portrait, square 1:1. {PERSON_NAME}'s face fills the frame from chin to mid-forehead, looking directly at the camera with steady eye contact and a subtle confident half-smile.

Lighting: large soft beauty dish from above creating gentle wraparound illumination, with subtle silver reflector below filling under-eye shadow. The eyes show sharp catchlights with the beauty dish reflection clearly visible in the corneas. Iris detail is tack-sharp showing natural color variation, fine veining in the whites of the eyes, visible eyelash roots.

Skin renders with full texture: micro-pores, fine lines, subtle uneven tone, individual stubble hairs, slight asymmetry. Subsurface scattering gives the skin organic warmth particularly visible at the ear tips and the bridge of the nose.

Shot on a Phase One XF IQ4, 120mm macro portrait lens, f/4. Slight organic film grain, subtle chromatic aberration on the eye highlights, soft halation on the brightest skin specular points. Native 4K resolution.

Avoid retouched plastic skin, avoid perfectly symmetrical face, avoid overly intense glamour aesthetic. Must feel like an editorial profile piece — confident but human, polished but real.

rubric: 01_founder_portrait — Rembrandt lighting, eyes alive, skin textured
02_workspace_lifestyle — laptop glow on face, candid feel, environment authentic
03_outdoor_golden_hour — rim light on hair, atmospheric haze visible
04_bw_editorial — high contrast B&W, raw skin texture, intense gaze
05_purple_cinematic — A24 mood, violet/cyan color story coherent
06_laughing_candid — genuine laugh expression, no posed feel
07_wide_environmental — full body, environment integrated, not pasted
08_close_up_eye_contact — eye detail visible, skin texture rendered, no plastic
min_pass_rate: Identidad consistente en los 8: mismo rostro, mismas proporciones. Si en alguna se ve 'parecido pero no exacto', regenerar con Identity Lock mas estricto.
